Researchers found that contaminated drinking water disproportionately affects children under five years old.
Wastewater treatment plants must meet strict new standards for removing pharmaceuticals from municipal runoff.

Innovative solar-powered desalination systems are providing clean drinking water to remote villages lacking traditional infrastructure.
Training programs educate community members about proper sanitation techniques and hygiene practices.
Scientists discovered that fluoride levels in rural water supplies remain dangerously low despite decades of public health campaigns promoting its benefits.

The cost of bottled water has risen dramatically due to increased production requirements and transportation expenses.

Resistance genes can spread between different bacterial species through horizontal gene transfer mechanisms.

Infections caused by resistant bacteria often require longer hospital stays and more expensive treatments than infections treated with standard antibiotics.
